schema.title: Response Get Campaigns Api Emails Campaigns Get

post.description:
Create a new email campaign.

Returns 409 Conflict if a campaign with the same name already exists
(case-insensitive match).  The response body contains the existing campaign
so callers can reuse it instead of creating a duplicate.

get.description: Get a single campaign with templates and stats.

post.description: Activate a campaign (start sending emails).
Pause a campaign (stop sending emails).

get.description: Get contacts enrolled in a campaign.

schema.title: Response Get Campaign Contacts Api Emails Campaigns  Campaign Id  Contacts Get

get.description: Get all campaign enrollment records for a contact.

post.description: Enroll contacts in a campaign.

Enroll all contacts matching the given filters into a campaign.

Two search strategies:
- When ``query`` is provided: uses ``hybrid_search`` (lexical + semantic
  across the enriched entity_search_index and semantic_chunks).  This finds
  contacts by industry/category even when the vertical field is sparse.
- When only structured filters: uses ``get_contacts`` (direct SQL LIKE).

delete.description: Remove a contact from a campaign.

post.description:
Backfill campaign progress from existing Salesforce lead timeline activity.
This seeds sent-email state for contacts that were already emailed directly in Salesforce.
Recompute campaign progression from existing sent/reply history.

get.description: Get statistics for a specific campaign.

post.description:
Export campaign contacts to Salesforce-compatible CSV and open browser to Data Importer.
Uses the same format as the bulk upload from Contacts page.

Start sending campaign emails.
Launches Salesforce automation in a separate process.

post.description: Search people in Sales Navigator and return lightweight profile cards.

Search for companies on Sales Navigator using a natural language query.
Uses GPT-4 to parse the query into SalesNav filters, then scrapes results.
Companies are optionally saved to the database.

Scrape leads (decision-makers) from a list of companies.
For each company, navigates to the company on Sales Navigator,
clicks "Decision Makers", and scrapes the results.
Contacts are saved to the database.

entity_type.title: Entity Type
entity_type.description: Entity type the note is attached to

entity_id.title: Entity Id
entity_id.description: Entity id (string or numeric id serialized as string)

EnrollContactsByFilterRequest.title: EnrollContactsByFilterRequest
EnrollContactsByFilterRequest.description:
Enroll contacts matching filter criteria into a campaign.
All filters are optional; at least one must be provided.

query.title: Query
query.description: Search query to run on Google

wait_for_ai_overview_ms.title: Wait For Ai Overview Ms
wait_for_ai_overview_ms.description: How long to wait for Google AI Overview before fallback to organic results

task.title: Task
task.description: Skill task name for the sub-items view (e.g. salesnav_list_employees)

parent_query.title: Parent Query
parent_query.description: Optional parent name to search/click before listing sub-items

parent_task.title: Parent Task
parent_task.description: Optional parent task used to find the parent (e.g. salesnav_search_account)

parent_filters.title: Parent Filters
parent_filters.description: Optional filters for the parent search step

entrypoint_action.title: Entrypoint Action
entrypoint_action.description: Action name to open the sub-items page (skill Action Hint)

click_target.title: Click Target
click_target.description: Optional item name to click/navigate to after extraction

extract_type.title: Extract Type
extract_type.description: Extraction kind (optional; auto-detected from skill when omitted)
